dialogue: Clean work, {userName}. The missile had a path and still died before impact.
That only worked because surveillance caught it early.
You are saying the next one may be hidden?
They tested cloaking on that strike. If we lose visibility, the path is gone and so is our advantage.
Dijkstra is not guessing. It is live mathematics. Without the feed, we cannot see the route it chooses.
*the main screen flickers, then drops to black*
{endDistance}. The missile is already inside the outer range.
Then we keep the eyes open and stretch the path.
